svg.title: UrVoice system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Full call flow from incoming phone call through Twilio, FastAPI backend, WebRTC VAD, ElevenLabs STT, Gemini LLM, ElevenLabs TTS, back to caller, with Firestore and Android app.

g.text: Dashboard · Contacts · AI Voice clone setup · Call handling · OTP auth

svg.text: Total response time: ~1.1s avg · WebRTC VAD · audioop G.711 mulaw
